subTitle.v: Cập nhật thông tin nhân viên: thêm, sửa, xóa...

command.text:
&CreateTicket;
declare @v nvarchar(4000) select @v = '' select @v = @v + rtrim(code) + ':' + case @@language when 'v' then name else name2 end + ',' from hrdirinfo where type = 'Gender' select @v = substring(@v, 0, len(@v)) select 'this._authorize = ' + rtrim(@@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'hrPIGeneralInformation', 'New')) + ';this._authorizeEdit = ' + rtrim(@@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'hrPIGeneralInformation', 'Edit')) + ';this._key = ''' + @ticket + ''';this._app =''@@appDatabaseName'';init$EmployeeGrid(this, ''' + @v + ''')' as message return

query.text:
declare @key nvarchar(4000), @join nvarchar(4000), @field nvarchar(4000), @bp_ref varchar(128) declare @male nvarchar(32), @female nvarchar(32), @f1 varchar(32), @f2 varchar(32), @f3 varchar(32) select @f1 = 'ten_bp', @f2 = 'ten_vtr', @f3 = 'ten_ttnv', @bp_ref = '', @join = '', @key = '' if @@language <> 'v' select @f1 = @f1 + '2', @f2 = @f2 + '2', @f3 = @f3 + '2'
if (@ma_bp <> '') select @bp_ref = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp select @male = case when @@language = 'v' then name else name2 end from hrdirinfo where code = '1' and type = 'Gender' select @female = case when @@language = 'v' then name else name2 end from hrdirinfo where code = '2' and type = 'Gender' select @field = 'stt_rec, a.stt, rtrim(ma_nv) ma_nv, replace(rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + rtrim(ten_nv), '''', '''''''') ho_ten,' select @field = @field + 'case gioi_tinh when ''1'' then N''' + replace(rtrim(@male), '''', '''''') + ''' else N''' + replace(rtrim(@female), '''', '''''') + ''' end ten_gt,' select @field = @field + 'ngay_sinh, ' + @f1 + ', ' + @f2 + ', ngay_vao, ' + @f3 + ''
select @join = 'left join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp left join hrvt d on a.vi_tri = d.ma_vtr left join hrdmttnv e on a.tinh_trang_nv = e.ma_ttnv'
if (@ten_nv <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'rtrim(a.ho_nv) + space(1) + a.ten_nv like N''%' + replace(ltrim(rtrim(@ten_nv)), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@ma_nv <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ma_nv like ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_nv), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@vi_tri <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.vi_tri like ''' + replace(rtrim(@vi_tri), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@ma_bp <> '') begin if (@nv_cd_yn = '1') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.bp_ref like ''' + replace(rtrim(@bp_ref), '''', '''''') + '%''' else set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.bp_ref = ''' + replace(rtrim(@bp_ref), '''', '''''') + '''' end
if (@ngay_vao1 is not null) set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ngay_vao >= ''' + convert(char(8), @ngay_vao1, 112) + '''' if (@ngay_vao2 is not null) set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ngay_vao <= ''' + convert(char(8), @ngay_vao2, 112) + ''''
if (@cmnd_so <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.cmnd_so = ''' + replace(rtrim(@cmnd_so), '''', '''''') + '''' if (@quoc_tich <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.quoc_tich like ''' + replace(rtrim(@quoc_tich), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@ma_bac <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.bac_quan_ly like ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_bac), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@nv_ql <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.nv_ql like ''' + replace(rtrim(@nv_ql), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@hon_nhan <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.hon_nhan like ''' + replace(rtrim(@hon_nhan), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@ma_tdhv <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ma_tdhv like ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_tdhv), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@ma_nn <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ma_nn like ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_nn), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@status <> '*') and (@status <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.status = ''' + replace(rtrim(@status), '''', '''''') + '''' if (@gioi_tinh <> '*') and (@gioi_tinh <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.gioi_tinh = ''' + replace(rtrim(@gioi_tinh), '''', '''''') + ''''
if (@nh_vtr1 <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'd.nh_vtr1 like ''' + replace(rtrim(@nh_vtr1), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@nh_vtr2 <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'd.nh_vtr2 like ''' + replace(rtrim(@nh_vtr2), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@nh_vtr3 <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'd.nh_vtr3 like ''' + replace(rtrim(@nh_vtr3), '''', '''''') + '%'''
declare @k1 varchar(1024), @k2 varchar(1024) select @k1 = stuff(@@firstItem, len(@@firstItem) - 12, 0, ' '), @k2 = stuff(@@lastItem, len(@@lastItem) - 12, 0, ' ') exec FastBusiness$HRM$EmployeeInformation$Finding @@table, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @k1, @k2, @key, @join, 'rtrim(ma_nv) + '' '' + stt_rec', @field, 'a.ma_nv', '@@sysDatabaseName', @@admin, @@userID
